name: karabiner-config-builder
description: A TypeScript builder for generating karabiner.json.

scripts.smoke: npm run check && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js --help
scripts.smoke:init: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-smoke-home /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-smoke-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js config list
scripts.smoke:build: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-smoke-home /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace /tmp/kcb-smoke-build.json && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-smoke-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js build > /tmp/kcb-smoke-build.json
scripts.smoke:deploy: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-smoke-home /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-smoke-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup
scripts.smoke:backup: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-smoke-home /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-smoke-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup create && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup list
scripts.smoke:restore: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-smoke-home /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-smoke-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js init /tmp/kcb-smoke-workspace && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --force --omit-backup && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup create && HOME=/tmp/kcb-smoke-home node dist/cli/index.js backup restore
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:init && npm run smoke:build && npm run smoke:deploy && npm run smoke:backup && npm run smoke:restore
